-- Case: ℙ A = 0
    have h₁ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
      have h₂ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := by
        have h₃ : A ∩ B ⊆ A := by

      have h₃ : ℙ A = 0 := h
      have h₄ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by

    calc
      ℙ(A|B) = 0 := h₂
      _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B := by rw [h₃]
  · -- Case: ℙ A ≠ 0

          field_simp [h, hA]
          <;> simp [h₁]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [ENNReal.mul_div_cancel_left]
          <;> simp_all [h₁]
          <;> simp_all [h]
        _ = ℙ(B|A) * ℙ A := by
          rw [h₃]
          <;> ring_nf
        _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) := by ring_nf
    have h₃ : ℙ(A|B) = (ℙ (A ∩ B)) / ℙ B := rfl
    have h₄ : ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B = (ℙ (A ∩ B)) / ℙ B := by
      calc
        ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B = (ℙ (B ∩ A)) / ℙ B := by
          have h₅ : ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
            linarith
          rw [h₅]
          <;> field_simp [hB]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [ENNReal.mul_div_cancel_left]
          <;> simp_all [h₁]
          <;> simp_all [h]
        _ = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by
          have h₅ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ (A ∩ B) := by
            rw [inter_comm]
          rw [h₅]
          <;> simp_all [h₁]
          <;> simp_all [h]
    calc
      ℙ(A|B) = (ℙ (A ∩ B)) / ℙ B := by rw [h₃]
      _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B := by
        rw [h₄]
      _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B := by rfl

simp [condProb]
                    <;>
                    (try
                      {

                  _ = ℙ(B ∩ A) / ℙ A := by rfl

            _ = ℙ(B ∩ A) / ℙ A := by rfl

-- Case: ℙ A = 0
    have h₁ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
      have h₂ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := by
        apply measure_mono
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff] at hx ⊢
        tauto
      have h₃ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
        have h₄ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := h₂
        have h₅ : ℙ A = 0 := h
        have h₆ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ 0 := by
          calc
            ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := h₄
            _ = 0 := h₅
        have h₇ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≥ 0 := by
          apply measure_nonneg
        have h₈ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
          apply le_antisymm
          · exact h₆
          · exact h₇
        exact h₈
      exact h₃
    have h₂ : ℙ(A | B) = 0 := by
      have h₃ : ℙ(A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
      rw [h₃]
      rw [h₁]
      simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
      <;> simp_all [hB]
      <;> field_simp [hB] at *
      <;> simp_all
    have h₃ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = 0 := by
      have h₄ : ℙ A = 0 := h
      have h₅ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) = 0 := by

        simp
      have h₆ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = 0 := by
        calc
          ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = 0 / ℙ B := by rw [h₅]
          _ = 0 := by simp [hB]
      exact h₆
    rw [h₂, h₃]
  · -- Case: ℙ A ≠ 0
    have h₁ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) := by
      have h₂ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
        rw [inter_comm]
        <;> simp [inter_comm]
      have h₃ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by
        have h₄ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by
          calc
            ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := rfl
            _ = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by
              have h₅ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by
                calc
                  ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by
                    simp [condProb, mul_comm]
                    <;> field_simp [hB] at *
                    <;>
                    (try simp_all [measure_inter, mul_comm])
                    <;>
                    (try ring_nf at *)
                    <;>
                    (try linarith)
                  _ = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by rfl
              exact h₅
        exact h₄
      have h₄ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by
        linarith
      have h₅ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) := by
        calc
          ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ B * ℙ(A | B) := by rw [h₄]
          _ = ℙ B * (ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B) := by
            simp [condProb]
          _ = ℙ (A ∩ B) := by
            by_cases h₆ : ℙ B = 0
            · exfalso
              exact hB h₆
            · field_simp [h₆]
              <;> ring
              <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
              <;> field_simp [h₆]
              <;> ring
          _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) := by
            have h₆ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) := by
              calc
                ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) := rfl
                _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) := by
                  simp [condProb, mul_comm]
                  <;> field_simp [h] at *
                  <;>
                  (try simp_all [measure_inter, mul_comm])
                  <;>
                  (try ring_nf at *)
                  <;>
                  (try linarith)
            linarith
      exact h₅
    have h₂ : ℙ(A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
    have h₃ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = (ℙ A * ℙ(B | A)) / ℙ B := rfl
    have h₄ : ℙ(A | B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B := by

    rw [h₄]

-- Case: ℙ A ≠ 0
    have h₁ : 0 < ℙ A := by
      have h₁ : 0 ≤ ℙ A := by apply zero_le
      have h₂ : ℙ A ≠ 0 := h
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne h₁ (by intro h₃; apply h₂; simp_all [ENNReal.ext_iff])
    have h₂ : 0 < ℙ B := by
      have h₂ : 0 ≤ ℙ B := by apply zero_le
      have h₃ : ℙ B ≠ 0 := hB
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne h₂ (by intro h₄; apply h₃; simp_all [ENNReal.ext_iff])
    have h₃ : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by
      rw [condProb]
    have h₄ : ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B = (ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A)) / ℙ B := by
      have h₄₁ : ℙ(B|A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A := by
        rw [condProb]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [inter_comm]) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try field_simp [h, ENNReal.ext_iff, instFunLikeApply]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
        <;>
        simp_all [inter_comm]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        field_simp [h, ENNReal.ext_iff, instFunLikeApply]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      rw [h₄₁]
      <;>
      simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      field_simp [h, ENNReal.ext_iff, instFunLikeApply]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    have h₅ : (ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A)) / ℙ B = (ℙ (B ∩ A)) / ℙ B := by
      have h₅₁ : ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
        calc
          ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) = ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) := rfl
          _ = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
            have h₅₂ : ℙ A ≠ 0 := h
            field_simp [h₅₂]
            <;>
            simp_all [ENNReal.mul_comm]
            <;>
            ring_nf
            <;>
            field_simp [h₅₂, ENNReal.ext_iff]
            <;>
            norm_num
            <;>
            linarith
      rw [h₅₁]
      <;>
      simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      field_simp [h, hB, ENNReal.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    have h₆ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
      calc
        ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
          rw [inter_comm]
        _ = ℙ (B ∩ A) := rfl
    calc
      ℙ(A|B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by rw [h₃]
      _ = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ B := by rw [h₆]
      _ = (ℙ (B ∩ A)) / ℙ B := by simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
      _ = (ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A)) / ℙ B := by
        have h₆₁ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) := by
          calc
            ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := rfl
            _ = ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) := by
              have h₆₂ : ℙ A ≠ 0 := h
              field_simp [h₆₂]
              <;>
              simp_all [ENNReal.mul_comm]
              <;>
              ring_nf
              <;>
              field_simp [h₆₂, ENNReal.ext_iff]
              <;>
              norm_num
              <;>
              linarith
        rw [h₆₁]
        <;>
        simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        field_simp [h, hB, ENNReal.ext_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith

theorem bayesTheorem (hB : ℙ B ≠ 0) : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ

-- Case: ℙ A = 0
    have h₁ : ℙ(A | B) = 0 := by
      simp [condProb, h, MeasureTheory.measure_empty, div_zero]
      <;>
      simp_all [ENNReal.mul_zero]
    have h₂ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = 0 := by
      simp [h, condProb, zero_mul, div_zero]
      <;>
      simp_all [ENNReal.zero_mul]
    rw [h₁, h₂]
  · -- Case: ℙ A ≠ 0
    have h₁ : ℙ(A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by
      simp [condProb]
    have h₂ : ℙ(B | A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A := by
      simp [condProb]
      <;>
      simp_all [MeasureTheory.measure_inter_comm]
    have h₃ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
      rw [MeasureTheory.measure_inter_comm]
    have h₄ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = (ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A)) / ℙ B := by
      rw [h₂]
      <;>
      simp_all [ENNReal.mul_div_assoc]
      <;>
      field_simp [h, hB]
      <;>
      ring
    have h₅ : (ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A)) / ℙ B = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ B := by
      have h₅₁ : ℙ A * (ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) := by
        field_simp [h]
        <;>
        simp_all [ENNReal.mul_div_cancel_left]
        <;>
        ring
      rw [h₅₁]
      <;>
      simp_all [ENNReal.div_assoc]
      <;>
      field_simp [hB]
      <;>
      ring
    have h₆ : ℙ(A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by
      simp [condProb]
    have h₇ : ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ B := by
      rw [h₃]
    have h₈ : ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ B := by
      rw [h₄, h₅]
    have h₉ : ℙ(A | B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B := by
      calc
        ℙ(A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by rw [h₆]
        _ = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ B := by rw [h₇]
        _ = ℙ A * ℙ(B | A) / ℙ B := by
          rw [h₈]
          <;>
          simp_all [h₃]
          <;>
          field_simp [h, hB]
          <;>
          ring
    rw [h₉]

-- Case: ℙ A ≠ 0
    -- When ℙ A ≠ 0 and ℙ B ≠ 0, we can directly apply the definition of conditional probability and algebraic manipulation
    have h₁ : ℙ (A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
    have h₂ : ℙ (B | A) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ A := by
      -- By definition of conditional probability
      simp [condProb, Set.inter_comm]
      <;>
      field_simp [h, hB]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [measure_inter_comm]
      <;>
      linarith
    calc
      ℙ (A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
      _ = (ℙ A * (ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ A)) / ℙ B := by
        field_simp [h]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [measure_inter_comm]
        <;>
        linarith
      _ = ℙ A * (ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ A) / ℙ B := by ring
      _ = ℙ A * ℙ (B | A) / ℙ B := by
        rw [h₂]
        <;>
        field_simp [h, hB]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [measure_inter_comm]
        <;>
        linarith

-- Case: ℙ A = 0
    have h₁ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
      calc
        ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := by
          apply measure_mono
          · -- Prove A ∩ B ⊆ A
            intro x hx

          <;>
            simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]

            norm_num

        _ = ℙ A * ℙ (B | A) := by

          <;>
            norm_num
          <;>
            linarith
    calc
      ℙ(A | B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := by rw [condProb]
      _ = (ℙ A * (ℙ (B | A))) / ℙ B := by rw [h₁]

        <;> linarith

simp_all [h]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> simp_all [h]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> simp_all [h]
          <;> norm_num

-- Case: ℙ A = 0
    have h₁ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
      have h₂ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := by
        apply MeasureTheory.measure_mono
        exact Set.inter_subset_left
      have h₃ : (0 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ℙ A := by
        exact zero_le _
      have h₄ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ (0 : ℝ≥0∞) := by
        calc
          ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := h₂
          _ = 0 := by simp [h]
          _ ≤ 0 := by simp
      have h₅ : (0 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ℙ (A ∩ B) := by
        exact zero_le _
      have h₆ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · exact h₄
        · exact h₅
      exact h₆
    have h₂ : condProb A B = 0 := by
      have h₃ : condProb A B = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
      rw [h₃]
      rw [h₁]
      simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
      <;> simp_all [hB]
      <;> field_simp [hB]
      <;> simp_all [h]
    have h₃ : ℙ A * condProb B A / ℙ B = 0 := by
      have h₄ : ℙ A = 0 := h
      have h₅ : ℙ A * condProb B A = 0 := by
        calc
          ℙ A * condProb B A = 0 * condProb B A := by rw [h₄]
          _ = 0 := by simp
      calc
        ℙ A * condProb B A / ℙ B = 0 / ℙ B := by rw [h₅]
        _ = 0 := by
          simp [hB]
          <;> simp_all [h]
          <;> field_simp [hB]
          <;> simp_all [h]
    calc
      condProb A B = 0 := h₂
      _ = ℙ A * condProb B A / ℙ B := by rw [h₃]
